Package com.irurueta.units

Class AngleConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.AngleConverter
  • public class AngleConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does angle conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying angle measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private static int DEGREES_AND_MINUTES
      Length for degrees and minutes.
      private static int DEGREES_MINUTES_AND_SECONDS
      Length for degrees, minutes and seconds.
      private static int DEGREES_TO_MINUTES
      Number of minutes on each degree.
      private static int MINUTES_TO_SECONDS
      Number of seconds on each minute.

      Modifier Constructor Description

      Constructor.

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double convert​(double input, AngleUnit inputUnit, AngleUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void convert​(Angle input, Angle output)
      Converts an angle to provided output angle unit.
      static void convert​(Angle angle, AngleUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates an angle to requested output unit.

      Converts an angle to requested output unit.

      Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.

      Converts an angle to requested output unit.

      Converts provided degree value to radians.
      static void fromDegreesAndMinutes​(int degrees, double minutes, Angle result)
      Gets angle from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes and sets the value into provided angle instance.
      static double fromDegreesAndMinutes​(int degrees, double minutes, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets angle value from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
      static Angle fromDegreesAndMinutesAndReturnNew​(int degrees, double minutes, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
      static void fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(int degrees, int minutes, double seconds, Angle result)
      Gets decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds and sets the value into provided angle instance.

      Gets decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      static Angle fromDegreesMinutesAndSecondsAndReturnNew​(int degrees, int minutes, double seconds, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.

      Converts provided radian value to degrees.
      static double[] toDegreesAndMinutes​(double value, AngleUnit unit)
      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.

      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.

      Converts provided angle to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
      static void toDegreesAndMinutes​(Angle angle, double[] result)
      Converts provided angle to integer degrees and decimal minutes.

      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.

      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.

      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.

      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.

      Converts provided angle to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      static void toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(Angle angle, double[] result)
      Converts provided angle to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      static double[] toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(java.lang.Number value, AngleUnit unit)
      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      static void toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(java.lang.Number value, AngleUnit unit, double[] result)
      Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Angle input,
                           Angle output)
        Converts an angle to provided output angle unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input angle to be converted.
        output - output angle where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Angle convertAndReturnNew​(Angle input,
                                        AngleUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an angle to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input angle to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted angle.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Angle angle,
                           AngleUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates an angle to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        angle - input angle to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Angle input,
                           AngleUnit outputUnit,
                           Angle result)
        Converts an angle to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input angle to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - angle instance where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       AngleUnit inputUnit,
                                       AngleUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - angle value.
        inputUnit - input angle unit.
        outputUnit - output angle unit.
        Returns:
        converted angle value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             AngleUnit inputUnit,
                             AngleUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - angle value.
        inputUnit - input angle unit.
        outputUnit - output angle unit.
        Returns:
        converted angle value.

      • degreeToRadian

        public static double degreeToRadian​(double degree)
        Converts provided degree value to radians.
        Parameters:
        degree - degree value.
        Returns:
        same angle converted to radians.

      • radianToDegree

        public static double radianToDegree​(double radian)
        Converts provided radian value to degrees.
        Parameters:
        radian - radian value.
        Returns:
        same angle converted to degrees.

      • toDegreesAndMinutes

        public static void toDegreesAndMinutes​(double value,
                                       AngleUnit unit,
                                       double[] result)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        result - array where computed degrees and minutes will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided array does not have length 2.

      • toDegreesAndMinutes

        public static double[] toDegreesAndMinutes​(double value,
                                           AngleUnit unit)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        Returns:
        array containing degrees and minutes.

      • toDegreesAndMinutes

        public static void toDegreesAndMinutes​(java.lang.Number value,
                                       AngleUnit unit,
                                       double[] result)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        result - array where computed degrees and minutes will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided array does not have length 2.

      • toDegreesAndMinutes

        public static double[] toDegreesAndMinutes​(java.lang.Number value,
                                           AngleUnit unit)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        Returns:
        array containing degrees and minutes.

      • toDegreesAndMinutes

        public static void toDegreesAndMinutes​(Angle angle,
                                       double[] result)
        Converts provided angle to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        angle - angle to be converted from.
        result - array where computed degrees and minutes will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided array does not have length 2.

      • toDegreesAndMinutes

        public static double[] toDegreesAndMinutes​(Angle angle)
        Converts provided angle to integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        angle - angle to be converted from.
        Returns:
        array containing degrees and minutes.

      • fromDegreesAndMinutes

        public static double fromDegreesAndMinutes​(int degrees,
                                           double minutes,
                                           AngleUnit resultUnit)
        Gets angle value from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        degrees - integer degrees.
        minutes - decimal minutes.
        resultUnit - unit of returned value.
        Returns:
        decimal degrees.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minutes is negative.

      • fromDegreesAndMinutes

        public static void fromDegreesAndMinutes​(int degrees,
                                         double minutes,
                                         Angle result)
        Gets angle from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes and sets the value into provided angle instance.
        Parameters:
        degrees - integer degrees.
        minutes - decimal minutes.
        result - instance where angle value and unit will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minutes is negative.

      • fromDegreesAndMinutesAndReturnNew

        public static Angle fromDegreesAndMinutesAndReturnNew​(int degrees,
                                                      double minutes,
                                                      AngleUnit resultUnit)
        Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
        Parameters:
        degrees - integer degrees.
        minutes - decimal minutes.
        resultUnit - unit of returned value.
        Returns:
        a new angle containing computed decimal degrees.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minutes is negative.

      • toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static void toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(double value,
                                              AngleUnit unit,
                                              double[] result)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        result - array where computed degrees, minutes and seconds will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided array does not have length 3.

      • toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static double[] toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(double value,
                                                  AngleUnit unit)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        Returns:
        array containing degrees, minutes and seconds.

      • toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static void toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(java.lang.Number value,
                                              AngleUnit unit,
                                              double[] result)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        result - array where computed degrees, minutes and seconds will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided array does not have length 3.

      • toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static double[] toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(java.lang.Number value,
                                                  AngleUnit unit)
        Converts provided angle value and unit to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        value - angle value to be converted from.
        unit - angle unit to be converted from.
        Returns:
        array containing degrees, minutes and seconds.

      • toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static void toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(Angle angle,
                                              double[] result)
        Converts provided angle to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        angle - angle to be converted from.
        result - array where computed degrees and minutes will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if provided array does not have length 3.

      • toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static double[] toDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(Angle angle)
        Converts provided angle to integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        angle - angle to be converted from.
        Returns:
        array containing degrees and minutes.

      • fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static double fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(int degrees,
                                                  int minutes,
                                                  double seconds,
                                                  AngleUnit resultUnit)
        Gets decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        degrees - integer degrees.
        minutes - integer minutes.
        seconds - deciaml seconds.
        resultUnit - unit of returned value.
        Returns:
        decimal degrees.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minutes or seconds are negative.

      • fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds

        public static void fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(int degrees,
                                                int minutes,
                                                double seconds,
                                                Angle result)
        Gets decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds and sets the value into provided angle instance.
        Parameters:
        degrees - integer degrees.
        minutes - integer minutes.
        seconds - decimal seconds.
        result - instance where angle value and unit will be stored.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minutes or seconds are negative.

      • fromDegreesMinutesAndSecondsAndReturnNew

        public static Angle fromDegreesMinutesAndSecondsAndReturnNew​(int degrees,
                                                             int minutes,
                                                             double seconds,
                                                             AngleUnit resultUnit)
        Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
        Parameters:
        degrees - integer degrees.
        minutes - integer minutes.
        seconds - decimal seconds.
        resultUnit - unit of returned value.
        Returns:
        a new angle containing computed decimal degrees.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if minutes or seconds are negative.
